toolUseResult.content:
# Sample App Java - Architecture & Implementation Status

## Module Architecture

```
sample-app-app          Entry point, Guice DI, service orchestration
  |
  +-- sample-app-ui     JavaFX workspaces, navigation, dock panel
  +-- sample-app-core   Models, AppState, EventBus, FeatureGate
  +-- sample-app-data   H2 repositories, caches, SDE loader
  +-- sample-app-esi    ESI HTTP client, OAuth SSO, API DTOs
  +-- sample-app-common Shared utilities (IskFormatter, Constants)
```

Dependencies flow downward. UI depends on core; app depends on everything.

---

## Application Startup Sequence

```
SampleApp.start()
  1. Show splash screen
  2. Resolve data directory (~/.sampleapp/)
  3. Load config.json (AppConfig)
  4. Initialize Guice (AppModule)
  5. Initialize H2 databases (Flyway V1 + V2 migrations)
  6. Load SDE if TypeCache is empty (SdeLoader -> D:\Eve_data\sde\)
  7. Initialize FeatureGate
  8. Load characters from database, restore tokens
  9. Create MainWindow (NavigationBar + WorkspaceContainer + StatusBar)
  10. Start background services (SyncService 15min, StationTradeService 1hr)
```

---

## Database Schema (H2)

### V1 - Core Tables
| Table | Purpose | Status |
|-------|---------|--------|
| Characters | SSO characters + refresh tokens | DONE |
| MarketTransactions | ESI wallet transactions | DONE |
| MarketOrders | Character market orders | DONE |
| Contracts | Character contracts | DONE |
| IndustryJobs | Manufacturing/research jobs | DONE |
| Assets | Character assets | DONE |
| Blueprints | Blueprint inventory | DONE |
| WalletJournal | ISK transaction log | DONE |
| WalletBalance | Current ISK balances | DONE |
| LoyaltyPoints | LP per corporation | DONE |
| AccountingGroups | Custom item groupings | DONE |
| AccountingGroupMembers | Group membership | DONE |
| StationPrices | Cached hub buy/sell prices | DONE |
| MarketStatistics | OHLC price history | DONE |
| TypeCache | Item type metadata (SDE) | DONE |

### V2 - SDE Tables
| Table | Purpose | Status |
|-------|---------|--------|
| SdeGroups | Item groups (groupId -> categoryId, name) | DONE |
| SdeCategories | Item categories (categoryId -> name) | DONE |
| SdeMarketGroups | Market group hierarchy (parentGroupId tree) | DONE |
| TypeCache.MarketGroupId | Added column linking types to market groups | DONE |

### Station Stats Database (separate H2 file)
| Table | Purpose | Status |
|-------|---------|--------|
| StationStats | Daily trade volume by type/location | DONE |

---

## ESI API Coverage

### Sub-Clients (EsiClient.java)
| API | Endpoints | Auth | Status |
|-----|-----------|------|--------|
| CharacterApi | getCharacter, getBlueprints | Mixed | DONE |
| CorporationApi | getCorporation | Public | DONE |
| AssetsApi | getCharacterAssets (paginated) | Token | DONE |
| MarketApi | getRegionOrders, getMarketHistory, getMarketPrices, getCharacterOrders | Mixed | DONE |
| UniverseApi | getType, getStation, getSystem, getNames, getIds, getGroup, getCategory | Public | DONE |
| WalletApi | getCharacterWallet, getCharacterTransactions, getCharacterJournal | Token | DONE |
| ContractsApi | getCharacterContracts (paginated) | Token | DONE |
| IndustryApi | getCharacterJobs | Token | DONE |
| SkillsApi | getSkills | Token | DONE |
| LoyaltyApi | getLoyaltyPoints, getStoreOffers | Mixed | DONE |
| FleetsApi | getCharacterFleet, getFleetMembers, getFleetWings | Token | DONE |
| SearchApi | search | Token | DONE |
| RoutesApi | getRoute | Public | DONE |
| UserInterfaceApi | openMarketDetails, setWaypoint | Token | DONE |
| ImageApi | character/corp/type portrait URLs | N/A | DONE |

### Features
- Automatic pagination (getAllPages)
- Rate limiting (X-Esi-Error-Limit headers)
- Retry with exponential backoff (502/503/504)
- ETag support
- Jackson JSON deserialization

---

## Service Layer

| Service | Purpose | Status |
|---------|---------|--------|
| BusinessLogic | ESI sync orchestration, data retrieval, trade analysis | DONE |
| SyncService | Scheduled ESI polling (15-min interval) | DONE |
| StationTradeService | Google Drive station trade CSV import (hourly) | DONE |
| ProfitTrackerLogic | Profit/loss calculation from transactions | DONE |
| IndustryCostingService | Manufacturing cost estimation | STUB |
| CharacterLoginService | SSO login flow coordination | DONE |
| WorkspaceDataServiceImpl | Bridge between UI and data/ESI | DONE |
| SdeLoader | YAML parser for EVE SDE files | DONE |

### Sync Status Messages
BusinessLogic.syncCharacter() publishes SYNC_STATUS events sequentially:
```
"Updating market orders..."
"Updating market transactions..."
"Updating wallet..."
"Updating assets..."
"Updating blueprints..."
"Updating industry jobs..."
"Updating contracts..."
"Updating skills..."
"Updating loyalty points..."
```
StatusBar displays these via AppState.syncStatusTextProperty binding.

---

## UI Architecture

### Layout
```
MainWindow (BorderPane)
  Left:   NavigationBar (vertical icon buttons)
  Center: WorkspaceContainer (switches workspace views)
  Bottom: StatusBar (connection, sync status, version, tier, EVE time, local time)
```

### Dock Panel System
- `DockableTabPane` - Enhanced TabPane with drag-to-reorder, right-click context menu
- `LayoutManager` - JSON save/load for workspace layouts (~/.sampleapp/layouts/)
- `WorkspaceLayout` - Data model (active tab, tab order, split pane dividers)
- Layout saved on workspace switch and app shutdown

---

## Workspace Status

### Legend
- DONE = Fully functional with live data
- FUNCTIONAL = UI built, basic data wiring, may have gaps
- PARTIAL = UI built, significant missing functionality
- STUB = Shell/placeholder only

| Workspace | Tabs | Status | Notes |
|-----------|------|--------|-------|
| **CharacterWorkspace** | Overview, Corp History | FUNCTIONAL | Shows character info, portrait, corp/alliance |
| **SkillsWorkspace** | Skills, Queue | FUNCTIONAL | Groups by level, async name resolution from TypeCache |
| **AssetsWorkspace** | Tree, Table, Details | FUNCTIONAL | Location tree, item names from ItemTypeCache |
| **WalletWorkspace** | Balance, Journal, Transactions | FUNCTIONAL | Date range filtering, ISK formatting |
| **AccountingWorkspace** | Profit Tracker, Groups | FUNCTIONAL | ProfitTrackerLogic integration |
| **MarketOrdersWorkspace** | Active, History | FUNCTIONAL | Character's own orders |
| **ContractsWorkspace** | Active, History | FUNCTIONAL | Character contracts |
| **MarketWorkspace** | Search, Appraisal, Browser | PARTIAL | Search works with TypeCache. Browser has region selector + live ESI order fetching + search. Appraisal paste parsing NOT implemented. Market group tree needs SDE data to fully populate. |
| **TraderWorkspace** | Station Trader, Regional Day-Trader | DONE | Station: live ESI scan, filters, favorites/blacklist, detail panel. Regional: parallel ESI scan, cargo/budget constraints, in-transit tracking, shopping list, trip summary. |
| **IndustryWorkspace** | Jobs, Blueprints, Manufacturing | PARTIAL | Jobs and blueprints from DB. Manufacturing cost calc is a stub. |
| **LpStoreWorkspace** | LP Stores, Item Search | FUNCTIONAL | Corp LP balances, ESI store offers, item name resolution |
| **FleetWorkspace** | Members | FUNCTIONAL | ESI fleet member fetching, name resolution |
| **UniverseBrowserWorkspace** | Regions, Systems | PARTIAL | Hardcoded regions, ESI system/station lookup |
| **PublicContractsWorkspace** | Browse | STUB | Returns empty list (ESI public contracts are very large) |
| **ToolsWorkspace** | Various utilities | PARTIAL | Placeholder tools |
| **SettingsWorkspace** | Account, Sync, Market, Display, About | DONE | Character management, SSO, config save, layout reset |
| **SetupWizardWorkspace** | Welcome, Add Character, Sync, Complete | DONE | First-run wizard with SSO + initial sync |

---

## Data Caches (In-Memory)

| Cache | Purpose | Populated By | Status |
|-------|---------|-------------|--------|
| ItemTypeCache | Type ID -> name/metadata | NOT populated at startup | NEEDS FIX |
| MarketPriceCache | Live price lookups | On-demand | DONE |
| AdjustedPricesCache | CCP adjusted prices | ESI /markets/prices/ | DONE |
| MarketOrdersCache | Session order cache | ESI region orders | DONE |
| SystemSecurityCache | System security status | ESI/hardcoded | DONE |
| TaggedTypesCache | User-tagged items | User input | DONE |
| TypeMaterialCache | Blueprint materials | SDE/ESI | PARTIAL |

---

## What's Done

1. Full multi-module project structure with Gradle build
2. Complete ESI client with 15 API sub-clients, pagination, rate limiting, retry
3. OAuth 2.0 PKCE SSO flow on port 63886
4. H2 database with 17+ tables, Flyway migrations
5. SDE YAML loader (types, groups, categories, market groups)
6. 17 workspaces with JavaFX UI
7. Dock panel with drag-reorder and JSON layout persistence
8. Background ESI sync (15-min) with status bar progress messages
9. Station trade import from Google Drive API (hourly)
10. Station Trader live market scanning via ESI
11. Regional Day Trader opportunity finding via ESI
12. Market Browser with search, region selection, live order display
13. Event bus for decoupled service-to-UI communication
14. Feature gating by subscription tier

## What's Left (Priority Order)

### High Priority
1. **Populate ItemTypeCache at startup** - After SDE loads into TypeCache DB table, also populate the in-memory ItemTypeCache so name lookups work without DB queries. Currently `ItemTypeCache` is empty and `getName()` returns `Optional.empty()`, falling back to the DB-backed `resolveTypeName()` which works but is slower.

2. **Test SDE loading end-to-end** - The SdeLoader has been written but not tested with the live app. Verify it correctly parses all ~48K published types from `D:\Eve_data\sde\types.yaml`.

3. **Market Browser tree population** - The SdeMarketGroups table and MarketGroupRepository exist but the Browser tab tree doesn't yet query them for lazy-loading children. Currently shows static root groups + search.

4. **Appraisal paste parsing** - The Appraisal tab has the UI but the "Appraise" button doesn't parse the pasted text into type IDs. Needs to match item names against TypeCache.

5. **ESI cache invalidation** - Sync always fetches from ESI. Should check HTTP Expires headers to avoid unnecessary API calls (C# does this).

### Medium Priority
6. **Manufacturing cost calculator** - IndustryCostingService is a stub. Needs blueprint material requirements from SDE + market prices.

7. **Public contracts** - Currently returns empty. ESI public contracts are huge; need pagination strategy and maybe regional filtering.

8. **Universe Browser enhancement** - Currently hardcoded regions/systems. Should load from SDE or ESI.

9. **Sync profiles** - C# has per-module configurable sync frequencies (Always, Daily, Monthly, Never). Java syncs everything every cycle.

10. **Data migration from C# databases** - User has 1.8GB of data in SQL CE (.sdf) files at `D:\Eve_data`. Could import historical data.

### Low Priority
11. **Light theme** - Only dark theme CSS exists
12. **System tray minimize** - Checkbox exists in settings but not wired
13. **ISK number format options** - Settings UI exists but format switching not implemented
14. **Font size setting** - Settings UI exists but not applied
15. **Mining ledger** - Returns empty list (no mining repo)
16. **Tools workspace** - Placeholder tools need implementation

---

## C# Reference

The original C# codebase is decompiled at `D:\Sample_App\decompiled\`. Key reference files:
- `SampleApp.Core.Sde/SdeLoader.cs` - YAML loading with YamlDotNet
- `SampleApp.Core.Cache/ItemTypeCache.cs` - Type cache with Dictionary<int, TypeMetaModel>
- `SampleApp.Core.UI.Workspace.Trader/StationTraderPresenter.cs` - Station trading logic
- `SampleApp.Core.UI.Workspace.Trader/RegionTraderPresenter.cs` - Regional trading (1200+ lines)
- `SampleApp.Core.UI.Workspace.Market/MarketSearchPresenter.cs` - Market browser

The C# data directory at `D:\Eve_data` contains:
- `sampleapp.sdf` (497MB) - main SQL CE database
- `egStationStats.sdf` (1.1GB) - station trade statistics
- `egRegionStats.sdf` (205MB) - regional market stats
- `sde/` - EVE SDE YAML files (used by Java SdeLoader)
- `Media/` - cached portraits, corp logos, type icons

- [User Profile](user_profile.md) — EVE Online player building Sample App desktop tool, experienced dev
- [Project Overview](project_overview.md) — Java 21 + JavaFX rewrite of C# Sample App v2.1.245
- [Build Quirk](build_quirk.md) — gradlew fails on Windows bash, must use cmd //c wrapper

---
name: User Profile
description: EVE Online player and developer building Sample App trading/industry tool
type: user
---

Experienced developer rewriting their C# .NET WinForms app (Sample App v2.1.245) to Java 21 + JavaFX 21. Familiar with both ecosystems. Character ID 1689391488. Uses the app for EVE Online market analysis, station trading, industry planning. Prefers getting things done over lengthy explanations.

---
name: Sample App Java Project
description: Multi-module Gradle Java 21 + JavaFX 21 desktop app at D:\Sample_App\sampleapp-java
type: project
---

Java rewrite of Sample App v2.1.245 (C# WinForms). Modules: sample-app-app (entry + Guice), sample-app-ui (JavaFX workspaces), sample-app-core (models/state), sample-app-data (H2 repos/caches/SDE), sample-app-esi (ESI client), sample-app-common (utils).

**Why:** Modernizing from .NET WinForms to cross-platform Java with virtual threads.

**How to apply:** Reference architecture.md and context.md in the project root for full status. The C# decompiled source at D:\Sample_App\decompiled\ is the authoritative reference for feature parity.

---
name: Gradle Build Quirk
description: ./gradlew fails on Windows bash due to JVM opts quoting - use cmd //c wrapper
type: feedback
---

`./gradlew build` fails with "Could not find or load main class -Xmx64m" because bash on Windows mishandles the DEFAULT_JVM_OPTS quoting in the gradlew shell script.

**Why:** Windows Git Bash / MSYS2 doesn't handle the single-quoted JVM args correctly.

**How to apply:** Always build with: `cmd //c ".\gradlew.bat build -x test"` instead of `./gradlew build`.

---
name: C# Data Directory
description: Live C# Sample App installation at D:\Eve_data with SDE YAML files and SQL CE databases
type: reference
---

D:\Eve_data is the user's C# Sample App data directory:
- `sde/` - EVE SDE YAML files (types.yaml, groups.yaml, categories.yaml, marketGroups.yaml, blueprints.yaml, etc.)
- `sampleapp.sdf` (497MB) - main SQL CE database
- `egStationStats.sdf` (1.1GB) - station trade statistics
- `egRegionStats.sdf` (205MB) - regional market stats
- `Media/` - cached portraits, corp logos, type icons

The Java SdeLoader reads YAML from D:\Eve_data\sde\ as a fallback path. The C# decompiled source is at D:\Sample_App\decompiled\.

---
name: User Prefers Parallel Agents
description: User explicitly asked for multi-agent approach for large cross-cutting tasks
type: feedback
---

User said "Do a multi agent approach and tackle each of these" when facing multiple workspace fixes. Prefers parallel execution for independent tasks.

**Why:** Faster turnaround on large changes that touch different files.

**How to apply:** When facing 3+ independent implementation tasks, launch parallel agents. Verify combined build after all complete.
